A location referenced along a network element using measure values.

## Formalization for LinearLocation

| Property | Constraint |
|----------|------------|
| [fromMeasure](../properties/fromMeasure/) | exactly 1 [Measure](https://w3id.org/itsdata/location/v1/Measure) |
| [referencedElement](../properties/referencedElement/) | exactly 1 [cdm3:NetworkElement](https://w3id.org/citydata/part3/v1/NetworkElement) |
| [toMeasure](../properties/toMeasure/) | max 1 [Measure](https://w3id.org/itsdata/location/v1/Measure) |
| subClassOf | [NetworkLocation](../NetworkLocation/) |
